feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Help me find this fucker, pls.
entry.content: Recently, there has been a ruckus at Malabon National Highschool, as an FB account by the name of "Bella Asx" threatened the entire school of committing a mass school shooting, along with threatening a nearby elementary school of the same thing. Now, there has been action taken by the authorities of Malabon, but I am frustrated with how slow they are. The authority is doing everything but tracking down the owner of this account. Speaking of the anonymous account, the user itself is treating shit
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: Hey i kinda came to this conclusion in a thread about this but the more i think …
entry.content: Hey i kinda came to this conclusion in a thread about this but the more i think about it the more it makes sense. All national sports is propaganda. You have a bunch of charismatic people made to represent your country, fighting for it. Then like if they win its an excuse to suck the dick of your country for something arbitrary and retarded. Theirs personal drama to get you more invested about the game and like wrestling shit about games being a clash of ideals well they mouth feed you propagand
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: What are your favorite BANNED games? Games you can't find literally anywhere. Ga…
entry.content: What are your favorite BANNED games? Games you can't find literally anywhere. Games that "they" don't want you to play for fear you may become too powerful and challenge the establishment. I'll start Disco Elysium Notice how you've never seen it at gamestop, walmart or target? Even though it's regarded on reputable sites as the best game of all time? Curious.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Roblox going down hill
entry.content: Starts in 2003<< becomes big in 2006<< everything is going well<< 2025 comes around<< bad update comes<< users angry<< a bit more bad updates come but not much<< 2026 comes<< adds age check<< user angry Angry<< adds even more bad updates<< user even MORE angry adds age check to chat<< users wanting chat and old roblox back<< a random X user finds old roblox page<< page gets deleted in 1 day<< users upset and saying they are removing history<< adds even WORSE updates<< users even EVEN MORE Angry<
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The random, one-shot combat ruins this game at a fundamental level. I love wasti…
entry.content: The random, one-shot combat ruins this game at a fundamental level. I love wasting 5 turns of production to make a unit that gets killed in one turn. And when you're fighting a stack, you don't even know what unit yours will target. Anyone who prefers this over 1UPT is a retard
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.content: >Bear With Me - Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/84130023/ >Scripts to check image metadata: ren

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why is the air so bad today?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The elder scrolls
entry.content: Why isn’t there an official morrowind remaster/remake/HD release? It’s a great game but so ugly and obtuse, especially compared to its contemporaries at the time even. A lot of it didn’t age well. And I don’t care for modding or unofficial content, that’s just not for me. Why can’t it get the oblivion treatment?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Request to create a vieo of Epstein...
entry.content: I can't get this to generate. Can somebody recreate the scene from the Sandlot where the ghost of Babe Ruth shows up and says "Heroes get remembered, but legends never die." But the ghost is Jeffrey Epstein. Please, and thank you. Feel free to add any other scenes with Epstein that might be funny too.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Words with venom, words that bind. Words used like weapons to cloud my mind. I'm…
entry.content: Words with venom, words that bind. Words used like weapons to cloud my mind. I'm a person. I'm a man. But no matter how I try, people just say "Hey! There's that "nigger" guy." Everywhere I go, it's always the same. Everyone just thinks of me as that one single name. "Hey Nigger Guy! Nigger Guy! Hi Nigger Guy!" Stop! Now go. Call me Nigger Guy! Fill me with your hate! Try to bring me down- Oop up, you're too late. When will it end, will there ever be a time? When I can be thought of as more... t
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

Patch will rise again LATEST EVENTS: Ruby VS Maka DEATH BATTLE out now on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rgR zzGsEtCk RWBY V10 has been greenlit: https://x.com/OfficialRWBY/status/1 941582029952311673 Previous Thread: >>83

I never had a GF and she took my virginity knowingly. entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linus has chosen to spit in the face of wise men who came before him. The 'Trust…
entry.content: Linus has chosen to spit in the face of wise men who came before him. The 'Trusting Trust' problem Thompson demonstrated in his 1984 Turing award lecture proved that a compiler can be modified to insert backdoors into everything it compiles, including future copies of the compiler itself, completely undetectable in the source code. This problem has never been solved. Wheeler's method for Diverse Double Compiling only solves it in theory and relies on the assumption of an already trusted 2nd comp
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: WTF, I thought /g/ told me that JXL was going to obliterate Webp in lossy image …
entry.content: WTF, I thought /g/ told me that JXL was going to obliterate Webp in lossy image compression. That only a clinically retarded inbred hillbilly mouth breather would ever even consider Webp. ffmpeg -framerate 1/3 -i %%02d.png -c:v libvpx-vp9 -cpu-used 0 -r 6 -g 9999 -b:v 0 -crf 0 -qmin 0 -qmax 0 -pix_fmt gbrp out.webm cwebp -sharp_yuv -m 6 -pass 10 -size 60000 01.png -o 02.webp cjxl 01.png 03.jxl -e 10 -q 27
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How many more years will it take for Linux to dominate as a gaming platform? Wit…
entry.content: How many more years will it take for Linux to dominate as a gaming platform? With its current level of dominance I can’t bring myself to switch. I’m not about to go back and forth between two operating systems. If the situation ever becomes worth switching, it’ll mean throwing windows out the window.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: /acrg/ - Artist/Commissioner Rant General #1041 Traditional arts Edition Remember to SCREENCAP your links so we can laugh when they delete their posts. Talk about artists or commissioners, mostly the bad ones or those who got under your skin. Share your experiences and get angry with us. For all artists (and commissioners who are close friends with artists) here, beware of: Horu, Pixxy, OkiOppai, Timedwatcher, AnythingGoes, Skitterleaf, kathielnotfound (Jocelyn Jones), and Snoopcrow/jbunny/j6un9

entry.title: /news/ News: Corruption at all levels: WH teleprompter operator made money betting on Trump's speeches
entry.content: https://abcnews.com/US/white-house- teleprompter-operator-made-100k-bet ting-trumps/story?id=134764573 President Donald Trump's longtime teleprompter operator is believed to have made tens of thousands of dollars by placing bets on more than a dozen of Trump's speeches on the prediction market Kalshi, federal investigators with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission found, sources familiar with the matter told ABC News. Gabriel Perez, a technical assistant to the president who has been operati
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What is everyone's daily driver AI platform? I'm not even talking about specific…
entry.content: What is everyone's daily driver AI platform? I'm not even talking about specifically for coding, images, and work. I just mean for general knowledge and daily conversations/questions? I've been using Gemini primarily because I have a Google Pixel phone, but it's let me down a few times. The "flash" version will make more mistakes and misinformation compared to the "thinking" model, but that makes sense. I started using the thinking model just for the reinforced accuracy and information. I don't
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

No scat/toilet/gay shit This thread is focused on netorare/netorase, if your post doesn't involve a waifu in any way and you only want to talk about black men, take it to the other general. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don'…
entry.content: This board is full of basement dwellers trying to make excuses for why they don't get off their lazy asses and watch Obsession or Odyssey. So they make up all sorts of mental gymnastics for not going and seeing it. They actually believe the director of Obsession was shilling on /tv/. LMAO And now they're gonna keep posting screencaps of Elliot and Lupita to convince themselves, see. I did the right thing. Why are you here? You don't watch movies or tv. You're just here to complain.
